personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: PHP Engineer • Laravel & Symfony
personalInfo.professionalObjective: PHP Engineer specializing in the Laravel/Symfony ecosystems and AI architecture orchestration (LLM, RAG). Expert in legacy system modernization and design of highly scalable SaaS platforms. Recognized for aligning technical excellence (high availability, performance optimization) with business objectives, while ensuring data security (RGPD, PCI-DSS) and elevating development teams.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: PHP Engineer
responsibilities: Led the migration of a legacy PHP monolith to a modern stack (Laravel 11, Symfony 7, API Platform), supporting peak loads of 1,200 Requests Per Second (RPS) with AWS auto-scaling guaranteeing 99.95% availability.
Optimized Backend performance (SQL queries, PHP-FPM configurations, Redis caching) by eliminating bottlenecks, achieving a 30% reduction in API response times for 200k+ Monthly Active Users.

Spearheaded the transition to Clean Architecture and SOLID principles for a team of 3 developers. Deployed automated test suites (PHPUnit/Pest) covering 80% of critical paths, reducing regressions by 35% and accelerating code reviews by 40%.

experience.title: Freelance PHP Developer
responsibilities: ZIRO.FIT (FinTech Marketplace) : Architected a marketplace processing $500k+ monthly GMV via Stripe Connect, with strict PCI-DSS security compliance. Optimized SQL queries (LATERAL JOINs) reducing latency by 60% across 2M+ records.

Lexity (AI EdTech) : Deployed a secure AI platform (data sanitization for RGPD compliance) with RAG-based feedback and a fault-tolerant LLM executor, maintaining a sub-200ms Time To First Token (TTFT) and 99.9% uptime.
Interly (AI Coaching) : Built a real-time AI voice coaching platform supporting 500+ concurrent audio streams with <300ms latency, via Web Audio API and Google Speech-to-Text integration.

experience.title: PHP Developer
responsibilities: Developed PHP/Laravel modules and scalable micro-services (Node.js/PostgreSQL) for Enterprise applications (processing 50k+ requests/day), applying SOLID principles and eliminating legacy bottlenecks.
Standardized code review processes with a structured checklist, reducing review turnaround time by 25%, keeping post-merge defects under 2 per sprint, and accelerating overall delivery cycles by 20%.
